reason: Event subscriber ownership, transaction and after-commit rules for points event refactor.
WebSocket endpoint remains route/HTTP adapter code and JWT query token auth behavior.
Internal API and WebSocket payload contract conventions.
Frontend WebSocket helper, realtime UI behavior, Svelte build/test requirements.
Change spans backend framework, routes, usecase events, frontend dispatcher, and UI.
